arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the CloudFormation type.

default_version_id.description: The identifier of the default version of the CloudFormation type.

deprecated_status.description: Indicates whether the CloudFormation type is deprecated.

description.description: A description of the CloudFormation type.

documentation_url.description: The URL to the documentation related to the CloudFormation type.

execution_role_arn.description: The ARN of the execution role for the CloudFormation type.

id.description: The unique identifier of the CloudFormation type.

is_default_version.description: Indicates if this is the default version of the CloudFormation type.

logging_config.description: Configuration for logging related to the CloudFormation type.

provisioning_type.description: Defines the provisioning type of the CloudFormation type.

schema.description: The schema that defines the CloudFormation type.

source_url.description: The source URL for the CloudFormation type.

type_arn.description: The ARN specific to the type configuration of the CloudFormation type.

type_name.description: The name of the CloudFormation type.

visibility.description: The visibility setting of the CloudFormation type (e.g., PUBLIC or PRIVATE).
